_note: Bounding boxes of MVP glyphs on data/sources/loth-1866/chart.svg (rendered at 1633x1869). Coordinates are pixel ranges (y0, y1, x0, x1) on the rasterised SVG. Edit any entry and re-run `uv run python -m mvp.tools.annotate_chart` to see the overlay; `uv run python -m mvp.render_canonicals` will pick them up for the side-by-side review.
